segments.text: Yes, at this my heart trembles, and is moved out of its place.
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: Hear, oh, hear the noise of his voice, the sound that goes out of his mouth.
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: He sends it out under the whole sky, and his lightning to the ends of the earth.
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text:
After it a voice roars. He thunders with the voice of his majesty. 
He doesn’t hold back anything when his voice is heard.
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: God thunders marvelously with his voice. He does great things, which we can’t comprehend.
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text:
For he says to the snow, ‘Fall on the earth,’likewise to the shower of rain, 
and to the showers of his mighty rain.
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: He seals up the hand of every man, that all men whom he has made may know it.
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: Then the animals take cover, and remain in their dens.
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: Out of its room comes the storm, and cold out of the north.
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: By the breath of God, ice is given, and the width of the waters is frozen.
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: Yes, he loads the thick cloud with moisture. He spreads abroad the cloud of his lightning.
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text:
It is turned around by his guidance, that they may do whatever he commands them
on the surface of the habitable world,
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: whether it is for correction, or for his land, or for loving kindness, that he causes it to come.
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: “Listen to this, Job. St and still, and consider the wondrous works of God.
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: Do you know how God controls them, and causes the lightning of his cloud to shine?
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: Do you know the workings of the clouds, the wondrous works of him who is perfect in knowledge?
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: You whose clothing is warmwhen the earth is still by reason of the south wind?
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: Can you, with him, spread out the sky, which is strong as a cast metal mirror?
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: Teach us what we will tell him, for we can’t make our case by reason of darkness.
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: Will it be told him that I would speak? Or should a man wish that he were swallowed up?
segments.speaker: Elihu

segments.text: Now men don’t see the light which is bright in the skies, but the wind passes, and clears them.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Out of the north comes golden splendor. With God is awesome majesty.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
We can’t reach the Almighty. He is exalted in power. 
In justice and great righteousness, he will not oppress.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Therefore men revere him. He doesn’t regard any who are wise of heart.
segments.speaker: Unknown
